summary: Root --help banner and MCP server display name use canonical brand casing "MakerWorld" (not "Makerworld"); root Short/Long restored to the full headline.
reason: The generator derived the root banner from the slug ('makerworld' -> title-cased 'Makerworld', lowercase 'w') and truncated the description with an ellipsis ('the web…'). Both diverged from the canonical product name 'MakerWorld' used in README, discover --help, and the manifest display_name/description, so the first thing a user saw misspelled the product. A reprint must seed the banner from the manifest display_name and the full description, not the slug.
